ARCHIVE_ONLY after audit. Planify is a 97MB fork of makeplane/plane (AGPL-3.0) wrapped as Phenotype UI. Has upstream/ (verbatim 15-pkg Plane fork, DO NOT MODIFY) + site/ (Astro+Bun+Tailwind landing page) + infra/ (Phenotype docker-compose additions). Upstream Plane code should remain as upstream/ subtree; only the Phenotype site/infra additions worth consolidating. Recommend: extract just the Phenotype-specific layers into phenotype-apps/planify-customisations/ rather than full absorption.

ARCHIVE_ONLY after audit. 13-crate workspace (eyetracker-{bench,bin,cli,core,macros,platform,v4l} + pheno-{minio,nats} + phenotype-{llm,mcp-server,surrealdb}). Includes binary pheno-runtime daemon. Total size 1.3M but workspace is too cross-coupled for naive absorption; would require 30-60+ min audit per crate. Recommend: consolidate the workspace metadata (member list + dependency graph) into docs/boundary/large-workspace-repos.md for future triangulation, not physical absorption in this session.

Self-declared implementations registry (catalog + schemas + servers + skills + plugins + agents). Has its own 30-file structure with multi-Python packages, validation scripts, and PyPI publishing pipeline. Not absorbable into any other repo. Treating as a SELF-DECLARED SPINE MEMBER alongside the 4-role spine (registry=INDEX, PhenoSpecs=ADRs, PhenoHandbook=CONVENTIONS, governance=ENFORCEMENT). Recommend: add PhenoMCPServers=IMPLEMENTATIONS to the 5th spine role, update SPINE-DEFINITION.md.

ABSORBED 2026-07-17 by concurrent agent — physically copied to docs/specs/pheno-specs/. SPINE INTEGRITY NOTE: PhenoSpecs is declared the ADRs/contracts member of the 4-role spine (registry=INDEX, PhenoSpecs=ADRs, PhenoHandbook=CONVENTIONS, governance=ENFORCEMENT) per its own README. Concurrent absorption destroys the spine peer relationship. Recommendation: declare the absorbed path as a "delegated mirror" rather than a true absorption, OR restore the upstream as the spine member.
